summary: Smoke-tested the client-side budget planner frontend. Covered app load, 6-item sidebar navigation, theme toggle + persistence, monthly budget set (₹37,000), planned Fixed item (Rent 8000) add + mark-paid, dashboard recalculation (Remaining 29,000, Spent 8,000), History/Calendar/Reports/Settings navigation and key elements, data persistence via localStorage, and mobile bottom-nav responsive layout. All primary flows working; no console errors (only benign Recharts sizing warnings and shadcn Dialog aria warnings).
passed: App loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL root; Dashboard renders
All 6 sidebar nav items visible: dashboard, planned, calendar, history, reports, settings
Theme toggle switches localStorage 'theme' light<->dark and persists
Set budget flow: edit-budget-btn -> budget-input(37000) -> save-budget-btn; hero-remaining shows ₹37,000
Planned page: add-planned-cat-rent opens PlannedDialog with input-name/amount/due; save-planned-btn creates item
mark-paid-<id> works: item marked paid, dashboard Remaining decreased to ₹29,000, Spent = ₹8,000
Reports page: KPI labels (Budget, Spent, Utilization) present
Settings page: active-month-input and export-btn visible
Persistence: after reload, hero-remaining still ₹29,000; localStorage key 'budget-planner:v1' exists
warnings: Recharts emits width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on Reports page (chart container sizing) - cosmetic, charts still render.
Radix Dialog missing Description/aria-describedby on PlannedDialog - a11y warning only.
